nasb.text: I have oxen and donkeys and flocks and male and female servants; and I have sent to tell my lord, that I may find favor in your sight.” ’ ”

esv.text: I have oxen, donkeys, flocks, male servants, and female servants. I have sent to tell my lord, in order that I may find favor in your sight.’”

cnv.text: 我擁有牛、驢、羊群、僕婢，現在派人來報告我主，希望得到你的歡心。’”

ccb.text: 现在他带了牛羊、驴和仆婢回来见你，派我们来报信，希望得到你的恩待。’”

csbs.text: 我有牛、驴、羊群、男仆和婢女；我派人来告诉我主，为要在你眼前蒙恩。”’”
